name: Improv via BLE
description: The `esp32_improv` component in ESPHome implements the open [Improv standard](https://www.improv-wifi.com/) for configuring Wi-Fi on an ESP32 device by using Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) to receive the credentials.

config_entries.label: Authorizer
config_entries.description: A [binary sensor](https://esphome.io/components/binary_sensor/) to authorize with. Also accepts `none` to skip authorization.

config_entries.label: Status Indicator
config_entries.description: An [output](https://esphome.io/components/output/) to display feedback to the user.

config_entries.label: Authorized Duration
config_entries.description: The amount of time until authorization times out and needs to be re-authorized. Defaults to `1min`.

config_entries.label: Identify Duration
config_entries.description: The amount of time to identify for. Defaults to `10s`.

config_entries.label: Next URL
config_entries.description: The URL to open after provisioning is complete. Defaults to `https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/config_flow_start?domain=esphome`.

config_entries.label: Wifi Timeout
config_entries.description: The amount of time to wait before starting the Improv service after Wi-Fi is no longer connected. Defaults to `90s`.
